ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account holder */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank or financial institution */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., institutional, retail) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the account */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the account where the investment is held */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the financial instrument */,
  "current_units" REAL /* Current number of units or quantity of the investment */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the investment */,
  "bs_class" TEXT /* Balance sheet class (e.g., LT for long-term, ST for short-term) */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the investment was traded */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the investment */,
  "book_value" REAL /* Book value of the investment */,
  "interest_dividend_due" REAL /* Interest or dividend due on the investment */,
  "accrued_balance" REAL /* Accrued balance of the investment */,
  "net_unrealized_gain_loss" REAL /* Net unrealized gain or loss on the investment */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the investment */,
  "market_value_accrued" REAL /* Market value including accrued balance */,
  "investment_status" TEXT /* Status of the investment (e.g., active, sold, matured) */,
  "investment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the investment */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the investment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was purchased */,
  "last_valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last valuation */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Risk rating of the investment (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "tax_status" TEXT /* Tax status of the investment (e.g., taxable, tax-exempt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_identifier FOREIGN KEY ("identifier") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., bond, stock) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the financial instrument */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) number for the financial instrument */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) number for the financial instrument */,
  "maturity_value" REAL /* Maturity value of the financial instrument */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate of the financial instrument (for bonds) */,
  "yield_to_maturity" REAL /* Yield to maturity (YTM) of the financial instrument (for bonds) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Issue date of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "investment_id" TEXT /* Reference to the investment involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell, interest payment) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was settled */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the trade */,
  "counterparty" TEXT /* Name of the counterparty in the transaction */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "trade_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has admin privileges */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "investment_id" TEXT /* ID of the investment being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the investment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the access event */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
